risk: profiles.email is copied at signup and can become stale if auth email changes.
recommendation: Verify live auth/profile behavior and add email sync only if email changes are supported in the product.

risk: Low; display name is client-writable for the user's own row.
recommendation: Keep current model; add length/content validation if public profiles or leaderboards launch.

risk: No avatar field or storage policy exists.
recommendation: Add only when profile images are a real feature; include storage bucket policies if files are uploaded.

column: encrypted password managed by Supabase Auth
risk: No app table stores password data.
recommendation: Keep password management in Supabase Auth.

risk: Only selected settings sync. Theme and later voice changes are local-only.
recommendation: Document the settings JSON shape and sync theme and voice consistently before treating settings as cross-device.

risk: Low; local hasOnboarded is restored from profile behavior.
recommendation: Keep current column.

risk: Client-authored; users can fabricate their own stage.
recommendation: Accept for solo learning; move stage advancement validation server-side before leaderboards/rewards.

risk: Client-authored from onboarding.
recommendation: Keep current column; validate only if placement affects paid unlocks or rankings.

risk: Low; synced through stats upload rather than profile settings.
recommendation: Keep as stats column or move to preferences if settings are normalized later.

risk: Client-authored and easy to fabricate.
recommendation: Server-validate XP before competitive or reward-bearing features launch.

risk: Daily quests and goal progress can diverge across devices.
recommendation: Add daily user activity/quest state or sync today_xp/today_date if cross-device daily behavior matters.

risk: Client-authored; future rewards can be fabricated.
recommendation: Keep for solo launch; server-validate before paid rewards or public ranking.

currentStorage: derived locally with unused database columns
risk: cards_mastered exists but upload/download ignore it, so database aggregate may stay stale.
recommendation: Either compute mastered cards from user_progress everywhere or maintain the aggregate with a server function.

currentStorage: derived locally with unused database columns
risk: cards_seen exists but upload/download ignore it, so database aggregate may stay stale.
recommendation: Either compute seen cards from user_progress everywhere or maintain the aggregate with a server function.

risk: Due count is derived; no separate aggregate exists.
recommendation: Keep derived from SRS rows unless performance requires an aggregate.

column: card_id, ease, interval, reps, lapses, learning, next_review, last_review
risk: Client-authored but isolated by RLS.
recommendation: Keep current sync for solo learning; validate server-side if SRS outcomes drive rewards.

risk: Only Stage 1 completion events are written; client can fabricate completion rows that may trigger notifications.
recommendation: Add validated mission state before rewards or public quest progress depend on it.

risk: Client-authored achievements can be fabricated.
recommendation: Move unlock validation server-side before achievements grant rewards or public status.

risk: Single value can overwrite another device subscription.
recommendation: Add user_push_subscriptions if reliable multi-device push is required.

risk: JSON shape is implicit; no DB-level validation.
recommendation: Document accepted keys and defaults; consider validation if clients expand.

risk: Stored in unvalidated JSON.
recommendation: Keep in profile settings but document allowed values.

risk: Stored in unvalidated JSON.
recommendation: Document allowed numeric values or normalize in user_preferences later.

risk: Stored in unvalidated JSON.
recommendation: Keep current sync; document setting shape.

risk: Stored in unvalidated JSON.
recommendation: Keep current sync; document setting shape.

risk: Stored in unvalidated JSON.
recommendation: Keep current sync; document setting shape.

risk: Theme does not follow the user across devices.
recommendation: Add theme to profiles.settings or a normalized user_preferences table.

column: selected_voice exists but Settings changes do not write it
risk: Voice selected during onboarding syncs, but later voice changes do not.
recommendation: Write voice changes to profiles.selected_voice or profiles.settings.voice.

risk: In-progress challenge state is lost on refresh or device switch.
recommendation: Add user_challenge_attempts only if resume/history is needed.

risk: Only aggregates persist; no per-attempt or question history.
recommendation: Add user_challenge_attempts and user_question_history before adaptive analytics or reward payouts.

risk: UI shows placeholder balance; no trusted wallet exists.
recommendation: Add user_wallets with server-side mutation before enabling gem earning/spending.

risk: UI shows placeholder hearts; no trusted hearts/energy model exists.
recommendation: Add user_wallets or a dedicated hearts table before hearts affect gameplay.

risk: No state or schema exists.
recommendation: Model in user_wallets only if energy becomes part of the economy.

risk: Shop buttons are disabled; no purchase ledger exists.
recommendation: Add shop_items and user_shop_purchases before enabling purchases.

risk: No consumable or unlock storage exists.
recommendation: Add user_inventory before power-ups or owned items launch.

risk: Client-authored and can be fabricated.
recommendation: Use server-side wallet/inventory mutations before streak freezes become paid or reward-bearing.

risk: Characters are static/stage-derived; no owned unlock state exists.
recommendation: Add user_character_unlocks before unlockable characters or skins launch.

risk: No active character preference exists.
recommendation: Add user_selected_character once users can choose characters.

risk: Mini-unit progress and completion are lost on refresh/device switch.
recommendation: Add user_mini_unit_progress before guided mini-units become a main learning path.

risk: No drag-and-drop lesson state exists.
recommendation: Add step-level progress only when drag-and-drop lessons are implemented.

risk: No subscription or entitlement model exists.
recommendation: Add user_subscriptions and entitlements before monetization.

risk: No ads or ad-removal entitlement exists.
recommendation: Represent ad removal as an entitlement before ads/paid removal launch.

risk: No paid pack catalog or access table exists.
recommendation: Add paid_content_packs and user_pack_access before paid packs.

risk: No attempt/audio/score persistence exists.
recommendation: Add speech_practice_sessions, pronunciation_attempts, and pronunciation_scores when voice recognition is built.
